channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Age of Trump Could Use the Wisdom of John Quincy Adams
item.description: The president admires Andrew Jackson's will, but he needs more of Adams's approach to diplomacy.

item.title: Trump says British Prime Minister Keir Starmer will resign: 'Failed badly'
item.description: President Trump said Sunday that British Prime Minister Keir Starmer will resign, saying the leader failed at handling the United Kingdom's immigration...

item.title: Sen. Lindsey Graham predicts diplomatic talks with Iran will fail
item.description: Sen. Lindsey Graham predicted Sunday that diplomatic talks with Iran over its nuclear program and keeping open the Strait of Hormuz will 'fail.'

item.title: Trump's energy secretary says oil flow will be 'back towards normal'
item.description: Energy Secretary Chris Wright said Sunday that the flow of oil through the Strait of Hormuz is returning to normal, even as Iran threatened to close t...
